title: Dependency update risk
task: Update a documentation site dependency and investigate one failing build step.
context: The dependency bump is small, but the build fails during static generation.

route.path: Maintenance / Dependencies > Static site build > Regression isolation
route.reason: Dependency management owns the bump, debugging isolates the build regression, and QA defines the validation gate.

omitted_skills.reason: The task is dependency and build behavior, not visual redesign.
Docs content should not change until the dependency issue is solved.

public_safety.review_notes: No real package incident details are included.
